title: SPAIN enforcement action against HIGHCLIFFE ESTATES MARBELLA, S.L. (8,500)
summary: Insufficient legal basis for data processing The Spanish DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 8,500 on HIGHCLIFFE ESTATES MARBELLA, S.L. The controller published the personal data of two individuals, including a photo of one of them, and accused them of occupying the controller's property. This processing had no sufficient legal basis. Legal bas...
